name: Visit Japan Web – Immigration & Customs Pre-Registration
description: Japan's official Digital Agency web service for pre-registering immigration (disembarkation card) and customs declaration information before arrival. Generates a QR code for use at airport e-gates and electronic customs declaration terminals. Paper forms remain an alternative for those who do not pre-register online.

name: Customs Declaration (Accompanied Articles)
description: All passengers entering Japan must submit a Customs Declaration for accompanied and unaccompanied articles. This can be completed digitally via Visit Japan Web (generating a QR code) or on a paper form available on the aircraft or at the airport Customs Inspection Area. Items to declare include cash or monetary instruments over ¥1 million, gold bullion of 1 kg or more, and goods exceeding duty-free allowances.
